title: Yedhedho Ennam Vandhu Lyrics  Amara Kaaviyam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Yedhedho Ennam Vandhu
Singer(s): Haricharan, Padmalatha
Movie: Amara Kaaviyam (2014)
Music: M.Ghibran
Lyrics: Parvathy

Yedhedho enna vandhu
en nenjai thaiththu poga
Yedhedho enna vandhu
en nenjai thaiththu poga

nee sonna vaarththai ellaam
naan odhum vedham aaga.
ennai un kannil kandu kollavaa
thozh thottaal vaanil neendhi sellava
thaenthuli pechchil serththaai
thithippai nenjil vaarththaai.

Yedhedho enna vandhu
en nenjai thaiththu poga

Unnai thottu vandha pinnaal
kattril yedho mattram kandaen.
vaasam vannam poosi kondu
thendral vandhu nirkka kandaen.

Pogum vazhi engum mounam
ennai killum
nee irundhum dhoorangal selvom.

Payanam engae mudindhaal enna
unnai thaanguven naan
veelndhidum varai.

Yedhedho enna vandhu
en nenjai thaiththu poga

Thizhil mella saayum nodi
pookkum pudhu thoppul kodi.
Thaagam kondu ullam vandhaal
theervai tharum undhan madi.

Annai thandhai sondham uyirthodum
bandam ellaamey aaneye neeye.
uyirn thadam aliyum munnal
unnai paarthida naa engiye nirppen.

Yedhedho enna vandhu
en nenjai thaiththu poga

nee sonna vaarththai ellaam
naan odhum vedham aaga.
ennai un kannil kandu kollavaa
thozh thottaal vaanil neendhi sellava
thaenthuli pechchil serththaai
thithippai nenjil vaarththaai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of emotional connection.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Amara Kaaviyam, this song reflects the protagonist's emotional journey and romantic aspirations.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Padmalatha.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Yedhedho Ennam Vandhu was composed by M Ghibran.

When was this song released?

This song was released on June 29, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yedhedho Ennam Vandhu, the protagonists express their heartfelt emotions through a beautiful melody that encapsulates the essence of love. The song unfolds in a poignant moment in Amara Kaaviyam, where the characters reflect on their feelings and aspirations. With soothing vocals and captivating lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. The collaboration between Haricharan and Padmalatha, under M Ghibran's composition, creates an enchanting listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yedhedho Ennam Vandhu is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Haricharan and Padmalatha, this song from the film Amara Kaaviyam resonates with deep emotions. M Ghibran's soulful composition paired with Parvathi's heartfelt lyrics makes it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: Something has come and disturbed my heart.
Everything you say becomes a sacred scripture for me. Will you recognize me when you see me in your eyes? The words that come from your heart are like a gentle breeze that brings comfort.
After touching you, I noticed some change in the air. I saw the breeze bringing colors and warmth.
Every path is silent, and you are far away from me.
Wherever the journey ends, I will hold onto you until I reach you.
Something has come and disturbed my heart.
In the gentle flow of the river, a new garden blooms. When desire comes to the heart, it brings solutions to your shelter.
Mother and father, all bonds of life are you. I will stand here until I see you again.
Something has come and disturbed my heart.
Everything you say becomes a sacred scripture for me. Will you recognize me when you see me in your eyes? The words that come from your heart are like a gentle breeze that brings comfort.
